revision.text:
<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}</noinclude>{{{cat|[[Category:All pages needing cleanup]]}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
   }}
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{cat2|}}}|{{{cat2}}}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date2|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date2}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date2}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
   }}
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{cat3|}}}|{{{cat3}}}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date3|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date3}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date3}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
   }}
  }}
 }}

    |[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
   }}
  }}
 }}

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/68.43.23.221|68.43.23.221]] ([[User talk:68.43.23.221|talk]]) to last revision by Excirial ([[WP:HG|HG]])

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}</noinclude>{{{cat|[[Category:All pages needing cleanup]]}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
   }}
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{cat2|}}}|{{{cat2}}}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date2|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date2}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date2}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
   }}
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{cat3|}}}|{{{cat3}}}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date3|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date3}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date3}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
   }}
  }}
 }}
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:

    |[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
   }}
  }}
 }}
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}</noinclude>{{{cat|}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |   }}
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{cat2|}}}|{{{cat2}}}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date2|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date2}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date2}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |   }}
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{cat3|}}}|{{{cat3}}}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date3|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date3}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date3}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |   }}
  }}
 }}
<noinclude>
[[Category:All pages needing cleanup]]
[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fix%2Fcategory here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fix%2Fcategory for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}</noinclude>{{{cat|}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |   }}
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{cat2|}}}|{{{cat2}}}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date2|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date2}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date2}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |   }}
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{cat3|}}}|{{{cat3}}}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date3|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date3}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date3}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |   }}
  }}
 }}
<noinclude>
[[Category:All pages needing cleanup]]
[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Fix/category]]": Restore to full per parent ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}</noinclude>{{{cat|[[Category:All pages needing cleanup]]}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
   }}
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{cat2|}}}|{{{cat2}}}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date2|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date2}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date2}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
   }}
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{cat3|}}}|{{{cat3}}}}}{{#if:{{{cat-date3|}}}
  |[[{{{cat-date3}}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |from {{{date}}}
  }}]]{{#if:{{{date|}}}
   |{{#ifexist:{{{cat-date3}}} from {{{date}}}|
    |[[Category:Articles with invalid date parameter in template]]
   }}
  }}
 }}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
